datasets.name: ds_adt_all
queryLines: SELECT event_time_stamp, CAST(event_time_stamp AS DATE) AS event_date, date_format(date_trunc('day', event_time_stamp), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS event_day, HOUR(event_time_stamp) AS hour_of_day, CASE WHEN dayofweek(event_time_stamp) IN (1, 7) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_kind, coalesce(nullif(trim(message_event_type), ''), '(null)') AS message_event_type, coalesce(nullif(trim(patient_class), ''), '(null)') AS patient_class, coalesce(nullif(trim(department), ''), '(empty)') AS department, coalesce(nullif(trim(facility), ''), '(empty)') AS facility, coalesce(nullif(trim(sending_facility), ''), '(empty)') AS sending_facility, coalesce(nullif(trim(admission_type), ''), '(null)') AS admission_type, coalesce(nullif(trim(financial_class), ''), '(null)') AS financial_class, coalesce(nullif(trim(CAST(discharge_diposition AS STRING)), ''), '(null)') AS discharge_disposition, patient_mrn, CAST(1 AS INT) AS row_n, CASE WHEN coalesce(nullif(trim(message_event_type), ''), '') = 'A01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS a01_f FROM bronze.ensemble.ens_adt WHERE message_type = 'ADT' AND event_time_stamp IS NOT NULL AND event_time_stamp >= date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), 365)

datasets.name: ds_total_events
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM bronze.ensemble.ens_adt WHERE message_type = 'ADT' AND event_time_stamp IS NOT NULL AND event_time_stamp >= date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), 365)

datasets.name: ds_admissions_today
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS admissions_today FROM bronze.ensemble.ens_adt WHERE message_type = 'ADT' AND message_event_type = 'A01' AND event_time_stamp IS NOT NULL AND to_date(event_time_stamp) = CURRENT_DATE()

lines: **Slicing:** all pages share **`ds_adt_all`**; pick dates and dimensions, then read **selection** counters vs the **ref** (unfiltered) row.

# ADT — `bronze.ensemble.ens_adt` (multi-page)
**1 Overview** — KPIs, daily, trigger mix, class pie, message sample. **2 Time** — hour, weekend, daily trend, A01 by day. **3 Location** — depts, facilities, sending, admission/fin/dispo.
**Ref** = fixed SQL, no slicers. Compare to **selection** above.
# Time: hour, calendar, A01 (selection, **use calendar filter** above)
# Location, routing, PV1 billing (selection) — `discharge_diposition` in bronze

frame.title: discharge disposition (typos per bronze column name)
